name: base/a11y
description: Accessibility rules — WCAG basics detectable from component contracts

rules.description: Button component should accept a "type" prop (submit/button/reset) to prevent accidental form submissions.
rules.fixHint: Add a "type" prop with options: "button", "submit", "reset". Default to "button".

rules.description: Input component should accept a "label" or "aria-label" prop for accessibility.
rules.fixHint: Add a "label" prop that renders a <label> element, or accept "aria-label".

rules.description: Select component should accept a "label" or "aria-label" prop for accessibility.
rules.fixHint: Add a "label" prop that renders a <label> element.

rules.description: Checkbox component should accept a "label" prop for accessibility.
rules.fixHint: Add a "label" prop that renders a <label> element associated with the checkbox.

rules.description: Image/Media component should accept an "alt" prop for accessibility.
rules.fixHint: Add an "alt" prop for image description. For decorative images, allow alt="".
